steps.name: expo-init

steps.name: type-defs

steps.name: constants-storage
steps.summary: src/constants/ 3개, src/lib/storage.ts, src/lib/error-log.ts 생성. STORAGE_KEYS, schemaVersion 마이그레이션 포함. typecheck 통과.
